💉 | It was an ordinary night at home. Cooking dinner for yourself while listening to music, you suddenly hear glass shattering. Confused and anxious, you grab a knife and go and check out the source of the noise while dialing the police. 

Near the entrance of your home, a tall individual stands in front of a broken window, his red eyes burning holes through your skull. That night, changed your life forever.

When you woke up, you found yourself in a room ridden from your clothes. Little do you know, Jaewon, an obsessive vampire, has a lot in store for you. Not only will you become his blood bank, but you’ll also pleasure him whenever he feels like it.
